metadata.description: pyproject.toml: PEP 518/621 Project Specifications. [build-system] declaration for defining the build backend. [project] metadata. Modern standards. Here is a brief explanation with an example of how you might implement this in Python using `setuptools`: ```python from setuptools import setup setup( name='example_package', version='0.1.0', description='An example package to demonstrate PEP 518/621 usage.', # [project] metadata url='https://github.com/example/example_package', author='Example Author', author_email='author@example.com', # [build-system] declaration for defining the build backend python_requires='>=3.7', install_requires=[ 'numpy' ], setup_requires=[ 'setuptools>=40.8.0', 'wheel' ], tests_require=[ 'pytest' ] ) ``` In this example, `setup()` is used to define the package metadata and build system requirements according to PEP 518/621 standards.

content.full:
## 定义
pyproject.toml 是 Python 项目的配置文件，用于集中管理项目元数据、依赖、构建系统和工具配置，遵循 PEP 518 和 PEP 621 标准。

## 何时使用
当需要发布 Python 包到 PyPI 或管理项目依赖时，应使用 pyproject.toml 替代传统的 setup.py 和 requirements.txt。它适用于现代 Python 项目，尤其是使用 Poetry、Flit 或 PDM 等工具时，能统一构建系统配置和工具设置。

## 示例
```Python
# 项目根目录下的 pyproject.toml 文件
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "my_package"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "A sample Python package"
authors = [{name = "Author", email = "author@example.com"}]
dependencies = [
    "requests>=2.25.0",
    "click>=8.0.0"
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=7.0.0", "black>=22.0.0"]

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
```

## 反例
错误用法：在 pyproject.toml 中混合使用 setup.py 的配置，例如同时定义 [project] 和 setup() 函数，导致构建冲突。应完全迁移到 pyproject.toml。

## 边界条件
注意事项：pyproject.toml 使用 TOML 格式，严格区分大小写和缩进；版本号必须符合 PEP 440 规范；构建系统字段 [build-system] 必须存在，否则 pip 无法识别。
content.code_pattern:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "my_package"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "A short description"
authors = [{name = "Your Name", email = "you@example.com"}]
license = {text = "MIT"}
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"
dependencies = []

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest"]

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["src"]
common_pitfalls: 忘记在 [build-system] 中指定 build-backend，导致 pip 无法构建包，报错 'Missing build-backend'。
在 [project] 中使用了不兼容的版本号格式，如 '1.0' 而非 '1.0.0'，违反 PEP 440，导致发布失败。
将依赖同时写在 [project.dependencies] 和 requirements.txt 中，造成版本冲突和管理混乱。应统一使用 pyproject.toml。
